ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jury_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jury member */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the jury member */,
  "jury_member" TEXT /* Label indicating the jury member's group */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the jury member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the jury member */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the jury member */,
  "profession" TEXT /* Profession or occupation of the jury member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography detailing the jury member's background and achievements */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for quick contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the jury member */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the jury member's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the jury member is currently active in the system */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the jury member joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the competition takes place */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the competition (e.g., singer, songwriter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the competition details */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the competition takes place */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organization hosting the competition */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for competition registration */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* End date for competition registration */,
  "competition_status" TEXT /* Current status of the competition (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jury_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jury assignment */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jury member assigned to the competition */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the jury member is assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was made */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the jury member has confirmed the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jury_assignments_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jury_assignments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES jury_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jury_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender category of jury members */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range (e.g., 18-25, 26-35) */,
  "profession" TEXT /* Profession category of jury members */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of jury members in this demographic category */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the jury members */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the jury member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jury_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition for which feedback is provided */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jury member being evaluated */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text feedback regarding the jury member's performance */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating (e.g., on a scale of 1-10) for the jury member's performance */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jury_feedback_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jury_feedback_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES jury_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jury_experience" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience entry */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jury member */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the field */,
  "notable_awards" TEXT /* Details of any notable awards received */,
  "institute" TEXT /* Name of the institution where the jury member received their education or training */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any relevant certifications held by the jury member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, jury member) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user authentication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jury member receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read by the jury member */,
  "read_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_coverage" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media coverage entry */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jury member covered in the media */,
  "media_source" TEXT /* Name or type of the media source */,
  "article_link" TEXT /* Link to the article or coverage */,
  "coverage_date" TEXT /* Date of the media coverage */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of media coverage (e.g., article, interview, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jury_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jury session */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition during which the session was held */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the jury session */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., preliminary, final) */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jury_sessions_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judging_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judging criterion */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition to which the criteria apply */,
  "criteria_description" TEXT /* Description of the judging criterion */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score that can be awarded for this criterion */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the criterion in the overall scoring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judging_criteria_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jury member giving the score */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition for which the score is given */,
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judging criteria */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score awarded by the jury member */,
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contestant being scored */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments provided by the jury member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_criteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("criteria_id") REFERENCES judging_criteria ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES jury_members ("member_id")
)
